capabilities.name: Predictive Lead Scoring
capabilities.description: Configure and optimize Naive Bayes PLS model. Set frequency fields, interpret probabilities, rebuild frequency tables, diagnose scoring issues.
examples: Configure PLS with custom fields like industry_id
Diagnose why all leads show 50% probability
Manually trigger PLS recomputation
Add a new scoring field and rebuild the frequency table

capabilities.name: IAP Lead Mining
capabilities.description: Generate B2B leads from external database using configurable filters. Manage IAP credit consumption and lead import.
examples: Generate leads for US SaaS companies with 50-200 employees
Set up automatic lead mining for new market entry
Monitor IAP credit usage for lead generation

capabilities.name: Lead Enrichment
capabilities.description: Enrich leads with company data via IAP Clearbit integration. Configure automatic vs on-demand enrichment.
examples: Configure auto-enrichment for all new leads
Manually enrich a batch of existing leads
Handle enrichment failures gracefully

capabilities.name: Partner Autocomplete
capabilities.description: DnB-powered company data autocomplete for new contacts.
examples: Configure partner autocomplete in settings
Debug autocomplete failures
Handle enrichment of company data after creation

capabilities.name: Pipeline Design
capabilities.description: Design and configure multi-stage sales pipelines with probability tracking, stage-dependent fields, and team-based stages.
examples: Design a 5-stage B2B SaaS pipeline
Configure rotting thresholds for stale opportunities
Set team-specific stages for different sales channels

capabilities.name: Lead Auto-Assignment
capabilities.description: Configure automatic lead assignment to teams and salespeople using weighted random allocation and round-robin distribution.
examples: Set up round-robin lead distribution for a 5-person sales team
Configure territory-based lead assignment
Debug why a salesperson isn't receiving assigned leads

capabilities.name: Opportunity Management
capabilities.description: Lead-to-opportunity conversion, merging duplicates, recurring revenue tracking, expected revenue proration.
examples: Convert a qualified lead to opportunity with correct partner linking
Merge duplicate opportunities preserving all history
Set up recurring revenue tracking for subscription-based sales

capabilities.name: Marketing Attribution
capabilities.description: UTM-based campaign tracking from first touch to closed won. Campaign/source/medium on leads via utm.mixin.
examples: Set up UTM tracking for a multi-channel campaign
Generate marketing attribution reports in CRM
Analyze which campaigns generate the most revenue
